intro: A deliberate workflow that respects your creative process.

steps.title: Capture
steps.description: Jot down a fleeting thought, paste a brilliant quote, or dictate an idea on the go. Capture is frictionless by design open Scriptor and write.
steps.visual_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 280 180" fill="none"><rect x="10" y="10" width="260" height="160" rx="8" fill="#1a1612" stroke="#332e27" stroke-width="1.2"/><rect x="24" y="24" width="232" height="14" rx="3" fill="#c9a84e" opacity="0.08"/><line x1="24" y1="52" x2="200" y2="52" stroke="#9c9488" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.5"/><line x1="24" y1="68" x2="240" y2="68" stroke="#9c9488" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.4"/><line x1="24" y1="84" x2="180" y2="84" stroke="#9c9488" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6"/><line x1="24" y1="100" x2="220" y2="100" stroke="#9c9488" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.3"/><line x1="24" y1="116" x2="160" y2="116" stroke="#9c9488" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.5"/><line x1="24" y1="132" x2="190" y2="132" stroke="#9c9488" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.4"/><circle cx="248" cy="150" r="8" fill="#c9a84e" opacity="0.12"/><path d="M244 150l3 3 5-5" stroke="#c9a84e" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>

steps.title: Cultivate
steps.description: Nurture your raw ideas into refined notes. Link related concepts, add tags, and let your collection grow organically into interconnected knowledge.
steps.visual_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 280 180" fill="none"><rect x="10" y="10" width="120" height="160" rx="6" fill="#1a1612" stroke="#332e27" stroke-width="1.2"/><rect x="150" y="10" width="120" height="74" rx="6" fill="#1a1612" stroke="#332e27" stroke-width="1.2"/><rect x="150" y="96" width="120" height="74" rx="6" fill="#1a1612" stroke="#332e27" stroke-width="1.2"/><rect x="22" y="24" width="96" height="8" rx="2" fill="#c9a84e" opacity="0.12"/><rect x="22" y="42" width="80" height="6" rx="2" fill="#9c9488" opacity="0.3"/><rect x="22" y="56" width="90" height="6" rx="2" fill="#9c9488" opacity="0.2"/><rect x="22" y="128" width="96" height="8" rx="2" fill="#8b2f3f" opacity="0.12"/><rect x="22" y="146" width="70" height="6" rx="2" fill="#9c9488" opacity="0.3"/><rect x="162" y="24" width="96" height="6" rx="2" fill="#9c9488" opacity="0.3"/><rect x="162" y="38" width="70" height="6" rx="2" fill="#9c9488" opacity="0.2"/><rect x="162" y="110" width="96" height="6" rx="2" fill="#9c9488" opacity="0.3"/><rect x="162" y="124" width="80" height="6" rx="2" fill="#9c9488" opacity="0.2"/></svg>

steps.title: Share
steps.description: Publish your notes as elegant documents, share notebooks with collaborators, or export to your favorite tools. Your knowledge, amplified.
steps.visual_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 280 180" fill="none"><rect x="10" y="10" width="260" height="160" rx="8" fill="#1a1612" stroke="#332e27" stroke-width="1.2"/><circle cx="80" cy="70" r="20" fill="#8b2f3f" opacity="0.08"/><path d="M72 70l6 6 10-10" stroke="#8b2f3f" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/><circle cx="160" cy="70" r="28" fill="#c9a84e" opacity="0.06"/><path d="M150 70l6 6 12-12" stroke="#c9a84e" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/><circle cx="120" cy="130" r="24" fill="#e8e2d8" opacity="0.04"/><path d="M112 130l6 6 10-10" stroke="#e8e2d8" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" opacity="0.3"/><line x1="220" y1="50" x2="250" y2="50" stroke="#c9a84e" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.4"/><line x1="230" y1="50" x2="230" y2="130" stroke="#c9a84e" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.4"/><line x1="220" y1="130" x2="250" y2="130" stroke="#c9a84e" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.4"/></svg>
